diagrams.title: MFA Authentication Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the three-factor authentication process in cloud
elements: System requests second factor (Something you have)
User provides biometric or token (Something you are)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multiple authentication factors work together to provide enhanced security

diagrams.title: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates the OAuth authorization code grant flow
elements: User initiates login at Client App
Client exchanges code for Access Token
Client uses token to access Resource Server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the OAuth 2.0 authorization process and token-based API access in cloud

diagrams.title: SAML SSO Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how SAML enables Single Sign-On in enterprise cloud
elements: IdP sends SAML Response with Assertion
SP validates assertion and grants access
diagrams.purpose: Understanding SAML-based SSO for enterprise cloud authentication

diagrams.title: Zero Trust Architecture
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the Zero Trust security model principles
elements: Access granted to specific resource only
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the never-trust-always-verify approach in modern cloud security
